mapper.select: SELECT C.ROLE_CODE FROM SYS_ROLE_USER B INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE C ON B.ROLE_ID = C.ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{id}
SELECT C.ROLE_CODE as "roleCode", C.ID as "id", C.DATA_SCOPE as "dataScope" FROM SYS_ROLE_USER B INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE C ON B.ROLE_ID = C.ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{id}
SELECT ROLE_CODE FROM SYS_ROLE WHERE ROLE_CODE = #{roleCd}
SELECT PERMS FROM SYS_ROLE_USER B INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE_MENU C ON B.ROLE_ID=C.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN SYS_MENU D ON C.MENU_ID=D.ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{id} AND D.MENU_TYPE = 'F' AND D.DATA_TYPE = 'PC'
SELECT PERMS FROM SYS_MENU D WHERE D.MENU_TYPE = 'F' AND D.DATA_TYPE = 'PC'
SELECT MENU_CODE FROM SYS_ROLE_MENU C INNER JOIN SYS_MENU D ON C.MENU_GID = D.GID INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE E ON E.GID = C.ROLE_GID WHERE D.MENU_TYPE = '3' AND E.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCd}

select a.ID, a.USER_ACCOUNT, a.PASSWD, a.USER_NAME, a.DEPT_ID, b.dept_name, a.IS_SUPERADMIN, a.POST_NAME, a.MOBILE, a.EMAIL, a.STATUS, a.PSD_UPD_DATE, a.SORT_NUM, a.CREATE_BY, a.create_by_name, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.update_BY_NAME, a.UPDATE_TIME from sys_user a left join sys_dept b on a.dept_id = b.id where a.USER_ACCOUNT = #{account}
SELECT B.PERMS FROM SYS_ROLE_MENU A LEFT JOIN SYS_MENU B ON A.MENU_ID = B.ID WHERE A.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND B.PERMS IS NOT NULL
